user.title: AI Camera Centre
user.description: Global settings — you can change these later, and add cameras and alert targets from the integration's Configure button.

data.ai_task_entity: AI Task entity (blank = Home Assistant's default)

abort.single_instance_allowed: AI Camera Centre is already configured.

add_camera.title: Add camera
add_camera.description: Any of the motion triggers turning on starts the AI analysis. The scene context is added to the AI prompt — describe what the camera sees, and say explicitly whether a gate is visible.

data.name: Camera name
data.motion_entities: Motion triggers (optional — leave blank to trigger via the ai_camera_centre.analyze service)

edit_camera_details.title: Edit camera
edit_camera_details.description: Any of the motion triggers turning on starts the AI analysis. The scene context is added to the AI prompt — describe what the camera sees, and say explicitly whether a gate is visible.

data.name: Camera name
data.motion_entities: Motion triggers (optional — leave blank to trigger via the ai_camera_centre.analyze service)

add_target.title: Add alert target
add_target.description: An alert target is a notify service that receives camera alerts. Set the minimum suspicion score it should be woken for, and optionally restrict it to specific cameras (none selected = all cameras).

data.min_score: Minimum suspicion score to notify (1 = every alert)
data.cameras: Only alert for these cameras (blank = all)

edit_target_details.title: Edit alert target
edit_target_details.description: Set the minimum suspicion score this target should be woken for, and optionally restrict it to specific cameras (none selected = all cameras).

data.min_score: Minimum suspicion score to notify (1 = every alert)
data.cameras: Only alert for these cameras (blank = all)

data.ai_task_entity: AI Task entity (blank = Home Assistant's default)

error.invalid_name: Please enter a valid camera name.
error.duplicate_camera: A camera with this name already exists.
error.invalid_service: Please select or enter a notify service.
error.duplicate_target: This notify service is already an alert target — edit it instead.
